mapper.insert: insert into sys_enum_define(enum_code, enum_name, enum_desc, category_code, category_name, is_enabled, sort_order, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark) values ( #{enumCode}, #{enumName}, #{enumDesc}, #{categoryCode}, #{categoryName}, #{isEnabled}, #{sortOrder}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime}, #{remark} )

insert into sys_enum_item(enum_code, item_key, item_value, item_desc, sort_order, is_default, is_enabled, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark) values
( #{item.enumCode}, #{item.itemKey}, #{item.itemValue}, #{item.itemDesc}, #{item.sortOrder}, #{item.isDefault}, #{item.isEnabled}, #{item.createBy}, #{item.createTime}, #{item.updateBy}, #{item.updateTime}, #{item.remark} )
